seoKeywords: how long to reach b1 level
explanation:
Modern **study methods and language learning** are grounded in cognitive science (Ebbinghaus, Bjork, Dunlosky). Techniques like spaced repetition, active recall, and interleaving have solid evidence supporting their effectiveness.

## How It's Calculated

Daily Duolingo minutes needed based on your target CEFR level (A1 through C2) and your current proficiency.

This calculator applies the formula using the values you input, checking typical ranges and alerting you to any values outside the reasonable spectrum.

## Final Notes

This calculation is a reference guide. For critical decisions related to career or certification choices, consult with a language learning professional. Values are current as of 2026 and reviewed regularly.

faq.q: How many minutes per day should I study on Duolingo?
faq.a: It depends on your target CEFR level and current proficiency. Use this calculator to estimate your personalized daily study time based on your goals.

faq.q: How long does it take to reach B1 (intermediate) level?
faq.a: With consistent daily study using spaced repetition, most learners reach B1 in 6-12 months. This calculator helps you set realistic daily goals.

faq.q: Is this calculator accurate for all languages on Duolingo?
faq.a: These estimates work well for most major languages. Individual learning speed varies based on prior language experience and learning style.

faq.q: What is CEFR and how does it relate to Duolingo?
faq.a: CEFR (Common European Framework of Reference) is the international standard for language proficiency levels. Duolingo's levels map roughly to A1-B2 range.

faq.q: Can I reach C2 (mastery) with just Duolingo?
faq.a: Duolingo is excellent for A1-B2. For C1-C2 mastery, you'll likely need supplementary resources, conversation partners, and language immersion.

faq.q: Is consistency or intensity more important for language learning?
faq.a: Consistency matters most. Regular daily study (30 min/day) beats occasional long sessions. Spaced repetition works best with steady frequency.

faq.q: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes. All Hacé Cuentas calculators are free with no registration required. We believe learning tools should be accessible to everyone.

faq.q: Do you track my study data?
faq.a: No. All calculations happen in your browser. We never store or send your study data to any external server.

sources.name: NIST — National Institute of Standards and Technology

dataUpdate.notes: Fixed formula, does not require external data updates
